insights.title: Curriculum health

info.card1: Total scheduled teaching hours in each month of the year for this subject, summed across every lesson. Use it to spot months that are unusually light or heavy.
info.card2: How the subject's teaching hours divide across its main strands — the core linguistic skills (Listening, Reading, Speaking, Writing, Basic Literacy) for English, or focus areas for other subjects. Highlights where curriculum time is weighted.
info.card3: Which topics recur across year groups (Prep–Y6). A filled cell means the topic appears somewhere in that year's curriculum. This shows presence and recurrence only — not how much depth or difficulty is added each year.
info.card4: Where each topic is and isn't taught across the years. A marked cell flags a genuine gap — a year in which the topic never appears — so you can see holes in the spiral at a glance.

insights.noCurriculum: No curriculum has been synced yet.
insights.notAvailable: Not available for this subject yet.
insights.fillsInNote: Fills in automatically as mapped curriculum is imported.

card1.title: Hours per month
card1.flagNote: Below {pct}% of this year's median ({median} h).
card1.empty: No teaching hours recorded for this subject yet.

card2.themeNote: Grouped by theme — this subject isn't focus-area structured.
card2.skillNote: Grouped by linguistic skill — this subject isn't focus-area structured.
card2.empty: No focus-area data recorded for this subject yet.
card2.emptySkill: No linguistic-skill data recorded for this subject yet.

card3.title: Spiralling across years
card3.empty: No focus-area or theme structure to spiral across years yet.

card4.title: Coverage & gaps
card4.gapsFlagged: {count, plural, one {# gap flagged} other {# gaps flagged}}
card4.empty: No focus-area or theme data recorded for this subject yet.
